acceptance_criteria: The sequence and ownership split are recorded in hub state and .ai artifacts.
A future session can see the intended order without rediscovering it from chat history.
Any planner/editorial work avoids concurrent edits to the code lane, and vice versa.
constraints: Coordination-only task; do not use it to replace the actual work tasks.
Keep the sequence lightweight and easy to update if the board changes.
description: Record the agreed sequence and ownership split for the endgame: Codex handles tone, argument spine, claim integration, and final synthesis; Claude handles the coding lane for comparative constraint simulation, ABM policy lab, real-constraint model, and final figure bundle.
goal: Keep the current planner/implementer work order explicit in hub and local .ai artifacts while the post is being finalized.
implementation_notes: Recorded the current execution sequence and ownership split in .ai/specs/current_spec.md and .ai/handoffs/money-minsky-policy-mismatch.md so future sessions can resume without rediscovering task order from chat history.
title: Execution sequence tracking for money-minsky-policy-mismatch
